scenarios.name: The Rank 1 Peak Climb
scenarios.description: Enter at Top 20, Exit immediately upon hitting Rank 1.

scenarios.name: The Rank 1 Peak Rider
scenarios.description: Enter at Top 10, Exit only when it LOSES the Rank 1 spot.

scenarios.name: Standard Top 10 Buffer
scenarios.description: Classic Top 10 entry, Exit if it drops out of Top 25.
